inline.description: An array of commands to execute. Commands are concatenated and executed within the same context.

script.description: The path to a script to upload and execute in the machine.

scripts.description: An array of scripts to execute in the order specified. Each script is executed in isolation.

binary.description: If true, specifies that the script(s) are binary files; prevents conversion of Windows line endings to Unix.

valid_exit_codes.description: Valid exit codes for the script. Defaults to [0].

env.description: A map of key/value pairs to inject prior to the execute_command.

environment_vars.description: An array of key/value pairs (key=value) to inject prior to the execute_command.

env_var_format.description: A string template used to ensure environment vars are set correctly. Default is "%s='%s' ".

use_env_var_file.description: If true, Packer writes environment variables to a tempfile and sources them instead of declaring them inline.

execute_command.description: The command template used to execute the script. Supports user variables and template functions.

expect_disconnect.description: If true, allows the server to disconnect (like a reboot) without throwing an error.

inline_shebang.description: The shebang value used when running commands specified by inline. Default is /bin/sh -e.

remote_folder.description: The folder where the uploaded script will reside on the machine. Defaults to /tmp.

remote_file.description: The filename the uploaded script will have on the machine. Defaults to script_nnn.sh.

remote_path.description: The full path to the uploaded script; overrides both remote_folder and remote_file.

skip_clean.description: If true, helper scripts uploaded to the system will not be removed by Packer after execution.

start_retry_timeout.description: The amount of time to attempt to start the remote process (e.g., waiting for SSH after a reboot). Default 5m.

pause_after.description: Duration to wait after the provisioner finishes, provided all steps were successful.

pause_before.description: Duration to sleep before starting the provisioner execution.

max_retries.description: Max times the provisioner will retry on failure. Defaults to 0.

only.description: Only run this provisioner for the listed builder(s) by name.

timeout.description: Maximum time allowed for the provisioner to finish before failing.
